image_dependency: Question explicitly asks for the SMILES of the transition-state structure shown in the image.
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the core information is visual rather than textual.
Choosing among SMILES options depends on reading molecular structure details from the image.
multi_step: Solver must first interpret the depicted chemical structure, then map that structure to the correct SMILES option.
This is more than direct OCR because it requires translating a visual molecular representation into symbolic notation.
The task is still relatively bounded because it is multiple choice with 4 options and no extended calculation.
verifiability: Answer is a short, explicit string and also matches one of the provided multiple-choice options.
Correctness can be checked directly against the keyed answer_text and choice set.
registry_passed=true, answer_present=true, and the image asset exists, supporting downstream validation.
